title: Hillside Seven-Bedroom Sea-View Villa above Kata Noi Beach, Kata - Phuket
blurb: A fully staffed seven-bedroom hillside villa looking straight down onto Kata Noi Bay — a 15-metre infinity pool across a two-level terrace, open-air spa room with sauna, private chef, and estate tennis court and gym, bookable from four to seven bedrooms.
detail:
Set on a secure, landscaped hillside estate above Kata Noi on Phuket's southwest coast, this seven-bedroom villa keeps the bay in view from almost everywhere — the living room, the dining table, the pool terrace and most of the bedrooms all look straight down onto one of the island's prettiest stretches of sand, about 800 m below. The villa is fully staffed, with a private chef and assistant, housekeeping and service staff, an on-call English-speaking manager and 24-hour estate security, and can be booked in configurations from four to seven bedrooms for up to 14 guests.

Outdoor living spreads across a two-level terrace built around a 15-metre infinity-edge pool: shaded salas for lounging and dining, a barbecue, a bar, a pool table and table tennis, and an open-air spa room with massage bed and sauna for in-villa treatments. Inside, a generous living and dining room runs on sea views, with a bar, a study corner, formal dining for ten, a lower-floor TV lounge and a fully equipped modern kitchen; entertainment runs through Bang & Olufsen and Bose systems. Families are well catered for with a playroom, cots, high chairs and games, and guests also have use of the estate clubhouse — gym, full-size tennis court, café and two further pools.

All seven bedrooms are en suite with sea or garden views — six with king beds, one twin-bedded and convertible. The top-floor master pairs panoramic views with a furnished patio and a large bathtub; the second master has floor-to-ceiling windows, a freestanding tub and a garden-view window nook. Kata Noi's golden sand is a short (if steep) walk downhill, with the restaurants, surf breaks and nightlife of Kata and Patong a few minutes further on.

features.l: 15 m infinity pool over Kata Noi Bay
Pool table, table tennis & B&O sound
